name: copy-task-template-verbatim-before-create
tags: task template create body format gate validation scaffold research feature bug misc epic tasks__create auto-fill task:5ee3b106
body:
tasks__create now auto-fills the body from task_templates/<task_type>.md when body is omitted (task:5ee3b106) — pass task_type (feature/bug/research/misc/epic, default misc) instead of hand-composing the Type:/section-header body from memory.

Why: hand-composing bodies from memory of other types' formats caused repeated create-gate failures (wrong section headers per type) before this fix landed.

How to apply: for a lightweight task, just call tasks__create(title=..., task_type=<kind>) with no body. Only pass an explicit body when you need custom section content beyond the title — it's still gate-validated in that case, so still check task_templates/<type>.md first if writing one by hand.
